explicit_text: I currently work as the director of Tourism at Mount Sterling, Kentucky, and I've been here for almost 16 years since January 2009. I moved back here when I was 13, and now I live on High Street in Mount Sterling. The community here is wonderful, and I love organizing events and promoting tourism to make Mount Sterling a fun and energetic place to visit.

explicit_text: I was actually born in Middletown, Ohio, because my parents moved there for work after my dad returned from the army. My dad worked at Armco Steel in Middletown, which was a big employer for people from Eastern Kentucky like my family. I lived there until I was 13 before moving back to Kentucky, and I have fond memories of growing up there surrounded by music and community.

Later, I also sold real estate in Lexington before moving back to Mount Sterling to be closer to family.
